Hero.description: I build modern, accessible, and responsive interfaces with React, Next.js, and Laravel, combining frontend development with a solid foundation in UX/UI to create products that are easy to use and maintain.

Profile.heading: Professional Profile
Profile.lead: My work focuses on turning complex ideas into intuitive, solid interfaces.
paragraphs: With 2+ years of experience, I build modern, accessible, and maintainable web interfaces, turning designs into clear, fast, and easy-to-use experiences.
My approach combines frontend development and UX/UI to create products where design, accessibility, and code work together.
I work mainly with React, Next.js, and Laravel, always aiming to build scalable solutions centered on the needs of the people who use them.

roles.title: Frontend Developer
roles.description: Development and maintenance of web interfaces for internal systems using Laravel. Involved in building reusable components, improving UX/UI, and optimizing accessibility following frontend development best practices. Collaboration on the evolution of the user experience, technical SEO, and interface design.

roles.title: Frontend Developer & UX/UI Designer (Freelance)
roles.description: Design and development of web interfaces for freelance projects, including a medical studies management portal for clinics and conversion-focused landing pages. End-to-end frontend, UX/UI, and backend API integration work.

Projects.heading: Featured Projects

items.title: Medical Studies Management Platform
items.challenge: Development of features for a web platform used by healthcare professionals to record, review, and manage patients' medical studies in a secure, centralized environment.
items.col2Value: Laravel · Livewire · Tailwind CSS · JavaScript · Alpine.js
items.result: Optimized the flow for assigning, uploading, and reporting studies between the clinic and doctors.

items.title: Medical Appointment Management Platform
items.challenge: Design an appointment management system that coordinates the assignment, booking, and reporting of studies across different user profiles: clinic, doctors, patients, and companies, while keeping the flow clear and fast.
items.result: Designed an appointment system with multi-role logic, where each user accesses flows specific to their role, optimizing the assignment and tracking of clinical studies.

Projects.landingsDescription: Fast websites with a clear identity and a focus on conversion for independent professionals.

landings.title: Sofía Capuano
landings.subtitle: Fine Art Photographer
landings.description: Bilingual portfolio for a photographer specializing in weddings, beach sessions, and intimate portraits. Minimalist design focused on natural light and emotion.

landings.title: Juliana Re
landings.subtitle: Nutritionist & Ontological Coach
landings.description: Landing page for a nutritionist focused on mindful, intuitive eating. 1:1 programs, group retreats, and family support.

landings.title: Jori Armonía Yoga
landings.subtitle: Jorgelina Cantone — Yoga Instructor
landings.description: Class booking site for a Therapeutic Yoga, Ashtanga Vinyasa, and Prenatal Yoga instructor. Organic design centered on calm and wellbeing.
